summary: Multi-Season Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 14/14 tests pass. Frontend: Season selector, switching, and new season dialog all working. Fixed 1 bug in 'Create New Season' dialog.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED - SelectItem with empty string value caused React error

critical_code_review_comments: Season selector dropdown correctly shows all seasons with camper counts
Switching seasons refreshes all data (campers, shadows, bus zones, bus staff)
Empty seasons correctly show 0 campers and empty map
Create new season dialog works with optional data copy from previous season
All CRUD endpoints filter by active season_id correctly
seed_data_creation: Test season '2099 Test Season' created during backend tests (0 campers)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-season feature is complete and working. Backend tests in /app/tests/test_season_api.py cover all season CRUD operations and data filtering. Two seasons exist: '2026 Bus Route Management' (530 campers, active) and '2099 Test Season' (0 campers). Frontend season selector is in the sidebar header. Fixed bug in Create New Season dialog where SelectItem had empty string value.

features_tested.backend_get_all_seasons: PASS - GET /api/seasons returns list of seasons with camper counts
features_tested.backend_get_active_season: PASS - GET /api/seasons/active returns active season with 530 campers
features_tested.backend_create_season: PASS - POST /api/seasons creates new season, optionally copies data
features_tested.backend_campers_filtered: PASS - GET /api/campers returns campers filtered by active season
features_tested.backend_shadows_filtered: PASS - GET /api/shadows returns shadows filtered by active season
features_tested.backend_bus_zones_filtered: PASS - GET /api/bus-zones returns zones filtered by active season
features_tested.backend_bus_staff_filtered: PASS - GET /api/bus-staff returns staff filtered by active season
features_tested.frontend_season_selector: PASS - Dropdown shows '2026 Bus Route Management' with camper count
features_tested.frontend_season_dropdown: PASS - Dropdown lists all seasons with camper counts
features_tested.frontend_season_switch: PASS - Switching seasons refreshes all data on map
features_tested.frontend_empty_season: PASS - Empty season shows 0 campers and empty map
features_tested.frontend_new_season_dialog: PASS - '+' button opens Create New Season dialog
features_tested.frontend_copy_from_dropdown: PASS - Copy from season dropdown shows all seasons
